title: {YTP} ~ Hanky Friggin' Decemberweenus!
description:
It's a Decemberween tradition to take a buncha stuff from everyone's favorite early-internet cartoon and splice it all up into new jokes that aren't as good. At least, that's what we did in the days of You're.

Support me: https://elliespectacular.com/support
